creator: demon@FreeBSD.org
text:
Looks like the following chunk
+          <dependency>
+            <groupId>org.jruby</groupId>
+            <artifactId>jruby-complete</artifactId>
+            <version>9.0.3.0</version>
+          </dependency>

is needed in Java-7 case too, not only for Java-8.
